problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Combining Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
